value_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner
catalysts_general: DoD $400M equity investment (Tier 2: DoD PR); CEO James Litinsky $26M+ stock sales (Tier 1: Form 4 — bear signal noted); China rare earth export controls (Tier 2: MOFCOM); interim magnet facility Q3 2026 (Tier 2: company update)

Discovery: China's rare earth export controls (implemented April 2025, partially suspended until November 2026) created a permanent scramble for non-Chinese magnet supply; DoD committed a $400M equity investment plus a 10-year offtake agreement for 7,000 MT/year of rare earth magnets, and MP's '10X Facility' comes online summer 2026 — stock trades at ~$53 vs analyst targets of $80-$100.
value_picks.analyst_take: DoD $400M equity investment validates rare earth national security thesis; interim magnet facility summer 2026; China RE export controls = U.S. sourcing urgency [CEO selling $26M is headwind but policy tailwind overrides]
